description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a hip roof finished in a dark color, supported by prominent columns on both levels. The front facade features a full-length balcony on the upper floor and a covered porch below, both bordered by green hedges and lined with evenly spaced shrubs. Large glass windows and doors provide ample natural light and a modern aesthetic, while the side and rear walls are mostly solid with minimal fenestration. The landscaping includes manicured bushes and trees, creating a symmetrical and inviting appearance. The main entryway is centrally located, flanked by tall, narrow windows and accessed via a paved walkway. The overall design blends traditional symmetry with contemporary materials and landscaping.
description: A two-story house with a dark hip roof, full-length balcony, large glass windows, and symmetrical landscaping with hedges and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, full-length balcony, covered porch, and symmetrical rows of shrubs and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid brick wall with minimal windows and landscaping along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a central double door, tall narrow trees, and a mostly solid wall with some greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the other side, with a solid wall and landscaping along the edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double door with covered porch, flanked by columns and hedges, and accessed via a paved walkway.
